revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-2-295

A form of site error caused by the direction finder antenna system not being mounted on the fore and aft line of the ship or caused by asymmetry in the structure of the vessel.

Reference: B.S. (modified)

{{IALAFooter}}
